en.text: from G0001 (as a negative particle) and a presumed derivative of G4350; actively, inoffensive, i.e. not leading into sin; passively, faultless, i.e. not led into sin

senses.gloss_en: from G0001 (as a negative particle) and a presumed derivative of G4350; actively, inoffensive, i.e. not leading into sin; passively, faultless, i.e. not led into sin
